name: Liftoff Mobile, Inc.
business: Liftoff Mobile, Inc. provides a machine learning-powered advertising platform for mobile app marketers. The company's solutions enable user acquisition and app monetization. Its platform is powered by the proprietary machine learning platform Cortex.

exposures.sentence: For example, among our advertiser customers (excluding third-party programmatic platforms which spend on our SSP), slightly less than half of our advertiser revenue came from our gaming vertical for the three months ended March 31, 2026.
Our Core Advertising revenue represents the vast majority of our total revenue and is derived from our current advertising platforms, which are primarily powered by Cortex-backed demand solutions.
